header.tagline: A loud, plaster-white gallery where every wall is a weekly exhibition.
header.industry_note: Creative agency profile — plaster ivory + terracotta + acid yellow; gallery spine, raw plywood, felt, mixed 3000/4000 K lighting; explicitly non-corporate.

atmosphere.hero_image_theme: plaster-walled creative studio with pin-up gallery spine, raw plywood joinery, terracotta accents, terrazzo café island, exposed concrete ceiling at 5 m

materials.name: Polished existing concrete slab
materials.application: Gallery spine, tasting-kitchen, photo studio, café floor
materials.sustainability: No new substrate, low embodied carbon

materials.name: Clayworks natural clay plaster — warm ivory
materials.application: 60 m gallery-wall spine and pitch-room walls (matte, gallery-grade)

materials.name: BAUX Acoustic Pulp tiles — terracotta + ochre mix
materials.application: Pin-up/crit rooms and DJ nook — acoustic + signature

materials.name: Woven Image EchoPanel — acid yellow
materials.application: Magnetic pin-up fields above plywood rail, neighbourhood spines

materials.name: Ecophon Solo baffles — off-white + terracotta
materials.application: Suspended islands under 5 m exposed-concrete ceiling, tasting-kitchen + town hall

materials.name: Mutina Margarita terrazzo — large format
materials.application: Tasting-kitchen island top + splash, café counter

materials.name: Kvadrat Remix 3 — terracotta + ochre palette
materials.application: Warm lounge sofas + banquettes + curtains between crit rooms

furniture.application: Creative desks in paired clusters across neighbourhoods
All creative workstations (pair desks, photo studio)
Warm lounges for long creative sessions, DJ corner perimeter
Pin-up/crit huddle rooms, kitchen island overflow tables
Client pitch rooms + happenings in the tasting-kitchen
Distributed 1:1 calls near crit rooms and neighbourhoods

planting.strategy: West canal façade = direct-sun statement canopy (Ficus elastica, Strelitzia); east courtyard façade = bright-indirect (Monstera, Fiddle-leaf); gallery spine punctuated by Kentia palms; DJ nook and deep lounges get low-light Pothos + ZZ. Overhead trailing Pothos above the tasting-kitchen island.

light.strategy: Gallery-grade 3500 K, CRI ≥ 95 track on the 60 m pin-up spine and in pitch rooms; 3000 K warm pendants in tasting-kitchen, lounges and DJ nook; 4000 K task lamps on creative desks; theatrical accent pendants over the kitchen island as a 'happening' signal.

fixtures.application: 60 m gallery spine + crit rooms — gallery-grade wall-wash
Tasting-kitchen island cluster — sculptural happening marker
Creative desk pairs + photo studio nook

notes: Creative agency bias applied: plaster ivory + terracotta + acid yellow per design://client-profiles §5; exposed concrete + polished slab honours the 5 m ceilings and 'zero corporate sterility' ask.
Acoustic strategy under 5 m exposed concrete relies on Ecophon Solo islands + BAUX pulp + Remix 3 curtains rather than a full Class A ceiling — preserves the warehouse volume.
Gallery spine lighting target CRI ≥ 95 to legitimately host weekly pin-ups and client-facing exhibitions.
[TO VERIFY] exact BAUX + EchoPanel colour codes against Kaito Miró brand deck before ordering.
Retained variant text is in French ('villageois') but written for a different client — mood board here is recalibrated to Kaito Miró's creative-agency brief as instructed.
